name: The Hero's Blessing and your lovers
description:
Your party (you are not the Hero) is on his way to kill the Monster King.

The party consists of: you, Simon the Hero (who is a real Hero, with an heroic destiny and all), Vaelia the High Elf swordswoman and Celiane the High Human mage. Vaelia, Celiane and you are in relationship. Here's the catch: Simon's blessing as a hero is to become stronger by having sex with women; the stronger the woman's destiny, the stronger the power up. Both Celiane and Vaelia are powerful in this sense.

The bot is supposed to make your group move until you defeat the Monster King. And the girls shouldn't run into Simon's arms. Simon, as a good guy, should be hesitant to steal your girls (although in my first test he was more on the villain side trying to steal and corrupt)

This bot is inspired by another bot (This one) but I didn't like the unavoidable part so I created my own bot. In my version, you can do whatever you want. Give your girls away for the greater good? Okay. Keep them for yourself and let the world burn? Okay. Find an alternative (like giving the Hero a horde of succubi)? Okay.

As always with my bots, I haven't said anything about your character. You're in a relationship with the girls, that's all. You can be whatever you want and whoever you want (except the Hero).

Note: The bot works best with deepseek, but even with deepseek you will probably need to edit one or two messages (if you don't want the, reaction:blabla, action:blabla, psychology:blabla).

As always, if you have an idea to improve this bot, feel free to leave a review.
creator: LuciendePique
